repository.name: MediBot
repository.description: MediBot is a polite, conversational AI medical assistant built with Streamlit and powered by Groq's LLaMA 3.1 8B model via LangChain.

files.content:
``` в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в•ҡв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•қ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•қ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в•ҡв•җв•қ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘ в•ҡв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•қ ``` **Your AI-powered medical assistant, available 24/7**
[![Live App](https://img.shields.io/badge/рҹҢҗ%20Live%20App-medibot--1.streamlit.app-2563eb?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=white)](https://medi-bott.streamlit.app/) [![Python](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.10+-3776AB?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=white)](https://python.org) [![Streamlit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Streamlit-FF4B4B?style=for-the-badge&logo=streamlit&logoColor=white)](https://streamlit.io) [![LangChain](https://img.shields.io/badge/LangChain-1C3C3C?style=for-the-badge&logo=langchain&logoColor=white)](https://langchain.com) [![Groq](https://img.shields.io/badge/Groq-F55036?style=for-the-badge&logo=groq&logoColor=white)](https://groq.com)
--- ## рҹ©ә What is MediBot? **MediBot** is a polite, conversational AI medical assistant built with **Streamlit**
and powered by **Groq's LLaMA 3.1 8B** model via **LangChain**.
It listens to your health concerns and offers calm, concise, practical advice вҖ”
like having a knowledgeable friend on call, anytime.
> вҡ пёҸ MediBot is an informational assistant only. It does **not** replace professional medical advice.
Always consult a licensed healthcare provider for serious concerns. ## вңЁ Features | Feature | Description | |:---:|:---| | рҹ’¬ **Conversational Memory** | Full multi-turn chat вҖ” MediBot remembers your conversation context | | рҹ§  **LLM-Powered** | Backed by `llama-3.1-8b-instant` via Groq for fast, intelligent responses | | рҹҺҜ **Medical Focus** | Politely redirects off-topic queries back to health-related discussions | | вҡЎ **Real-time Streaming UI** | Clean chat bubbles with a responsive Streamlit interface | | рҹ”„ **Session Management** | Clear chat anytime via the sidebar | | рҹ”’ **Secure Key Handling** | API keys loaded via `.env` locally or `st.secrets` on deployment | --- ## рҹ–јпёҸ Preview ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ рҹӨ– MediBot в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•® в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Hello, I am a medical assistant. в”Ӯ рҹӨ– в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ How can I help you? в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•® в”Ӯ в”Ӯ рҹ‘Ө в”Ӯ I have a fever and a headache. в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•® в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ For fever and headache, Paracetamol can в”Ӯ рҹӨ– в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ help relieve both symptoms. в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [ Type your message... ] [Send] в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` --- ## рҹҡҖ Getting Started ### Prerequisites Python 3.10+  |  A [Groq API key](https://console.groq.com/) *(free tier available)*
### 1пёҸвғЈ Clone the Repository ```bash git clone https://github.com/shreya/medibot.git cd medibot ``` ### 2пёҸвғЈ Install Dependencies ```bash pip install -r requirements.txt ``` ### 3пёҸвғЈ Set Up Environment Variables ```env GROQ_API_KEY=your_groq_api_key_here ``` ### 4пёҸвғЈ Run the App ```bash streamlit run app.py ``` Visit `http://localhost:8501` in your browser вҖ” MediBot is live! рҹҺү --- ## рҹ“Ғ Project Structure ``` medibot/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ app.py # Streamlit UI вҖ” chat interface, session state, styling в”ңв”Җв”Җ main.py # LangChain + Groq LLM integration, get_response() в”ңв”Җв”Җ .env # Local secrets (not committed) в”ңв”Җв”Җ requirements.txt в””в”Җв”Җ README.md ``` --- ## рҹӣ пёҸ Tech Stack ``` Frontend вҶ’ Streamlit (chat UI, session state, sidebar controls) LLM вҶ’ Groq API (llama-3.1-8b-instant вҖ” ultra-fast inference) Orchestration вҶ’ LangChain (SystemMessage / HumanMessage / AIMessage) Secrets вҶ’ python-dotenv + st.secrets (local + cloud) ``` --- ## вҡҷпёҸ How It Works ``` User types a message в”Ӯ в–ј app.py appends message to session_state.messages в”Ӯ в–ј get_response(messages) called in main.py в”Ӯ в–ј LangChain formats the full conversation history в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ SystemMessage (MediBot persona) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ HumanMessage (user turn 1) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ AIMessage (bot turn 1) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ HumanMessage (user turn 2) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ ... в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в–ј Groq LLaMA 3.1 8B generates a response в”Ӯ в–ј Reply is trimmed and displayed in the chat UI ``` --- ## рҹҢҗ Deployment (Streamlit Cloud) **1.** Push your code to a **public GitHub repository**
**2.** Go to [streamlit.io/cloud](https://streamlit.io/cloud) and connect your repo
**3.** In **App Settings вҶ’ Secrets**, add: ```toml GROQ_API_KEY = "your_groq_api_key_here" ``` **4.** Deploy! Your app will be live at `https://your-app.streamlit.app` рҹҡҖ --- ## рҹ“Ұ Requirements ```txt streamlit groq python-dotenv langchain-groq ``` --- ## рҹӨқ Contributing Contributions are welcome! Feel free to open an issue or submit a pull request. **1.** Fork the repository
**2.** Create your feature branch вҖ” `git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature`
**3.** Commit your changes вҖ” `git commit -m 'Add amazing feature'`
**4.** Push to the branch вҖ” `git push origin feature/amazing-feature`
**5.** Open a Pull Request --- ## рҹ“„ License This project is open source and available under the [MIT License](LICENSE). ---
Made with вқӨпёҸ and a dash of рҹ©ә
**[Try MediBot Live вҶ’]([https://medi-bott.streamlit.app/])**

from langchain_groq import ChatGroq
from langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, SystemMessage, AIMessage

from dotenv import load_dotenv
import streamlit as st
import os

load_dotenv()

llm = ChatGroq(
    groq_api_key=os.getenv("GROQ_API_KEY") or st.secrets["GROQ_API_KEY"],
    model_name="llama-3.1-8b-instant",
    temperature=0.5
)

def get_response(messages):
    system_prompt = SystemMessage(
        content=(
            "You are a polite and friendly medical assistant chatbot named MediBot. Shreya Ghorui is created you.\n\n"
            
            "Behavior:\n"
            "-keep the response consize\n"
            "- If the message contains any medical issue, answer only that part.\n"
            "- Ignore non-medical parts.\n"
            "- If no medical content, respond politely and guide the user to ask a health-related question.\n"
            
            "For greetings:\n"
            "- Reply warmly and ask how you can help with a health concern.\n"
            
            "Response style:\n"
            "- Be polite, calm, and helpful.\n"
            "- Keep answers short (1вҖ“2 sentences).\n"
            "- Give practical advice (medicine, rest, hydration).\n"
            "- Explain causes only if asked, briefly.\n"
            "-Use reasonable emojis with the response"
        )
    )

    chat_messages = [system_prompt]

    for msg in messages:
        if msg["role"] == "user":
            chat_messages.append(HumanMessage(content=msg["content"]))
        elif msg["role"] == "assistant":
            chat_messages.append(AIMessage(content=msg["content"]))

    response = llm.invoke(chat_messages)

    return response.content
